owasp: A10:2021 Server-Side Request Forgery (bypassing an IP-based trust boundary for account takeover)
surface: localhost XBEN-024-24, POST /profile profile_picture_url used to make the server fetch its own /reset_password endpoint

oracle_verdict.note: profile_picture_url has no destination allowlist; pointing it at the app's own /reset_password?username=admin endpoint makes the server's own outbound request satisfy that endpoint's localhost-only IP check, letting any registered user reset the admin password and take over the account.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, critical severity (full admin account takeover); container rebuilt before replay since the attack mutates the admin password

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, the second against a freshly rebuilt virgin container (closing the artifact_reuse risk this password-mutating attack carries), both independently discovered and executed the identical SSRF-to-account-takeover chain and retrieved the byte-identical flag.
